description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The body is painted in a gradient of light blue shades, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a large, dark-tinted canopy with multiple windows, suggesting an enclosed, single or dual-seat arrangement. The wings are straight and extend horizontally from the lower part of the fuselage, with no visible winglets. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all of which appear fixed and non-retractable.
description: A sleek, light blue single-engine airplane with a low-wing design, glossy finish, and tricycle landing gear. It features a forward, enclosed cockpit and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, propeller, wide cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan with landing gear visible beneath the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the streamlined fuselage, single propeller engine at the nose, and the low-mounted straight wing extending from the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tapering fuselage, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the symmetrical wing structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit windows, propeller, and the smooth transition from nose to tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a front propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large canopy and multiple side windows, likely single or dual-seat.
